full_text:
Yin Xiu (Yuanji) 陰修 (元基)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Xiu (陰修), styledYuanji (元基), was born in Nanyang. Recommended Zhong Yao, Xun Yu, Xun You, and Guo Tu to office. Sent as envoy to Yuan Shao, he was executed by Yuan Shu. Yin Xiu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Dong Zhuo. Yin Xiu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
